## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Goodcall to discuss SEO progress, website improvements, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website improvements: H1 tags fixed, table of contents moved, duplicate content removed, footer links added](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Content: 45 articles published this week, focusing on 50 new industries for answering services](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [SEO performance: Clicks increased 50% (90 to 140), mainly from answering services category](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Link building: Expecting high-quality links before June, aiming for 20 links/month](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Keywords: 75+ in top 10 Google results, with growth in SERP features but potential click impact from AI views](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)

## Topics

### Website Improvements

  - [Fixed H1 tags per page](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Moved table of contents below images](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Removed duplicate content](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Added footer links to clusters (salons, BPOs, answering services)](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Cleaned up JavaScript rendering issues](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Mobile responsiveness still needs work](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Content Strategy and Publishing

  - [Published 45 articles this week (up from usual 25/week)](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Focusing on 50 new industries for answering services](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Bulova reviews and comparisons completed](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [BPO and Ceylon content underperforming; will reassess in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [Clicks increased from 90 to 140 (50% growth)](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Main growth from answering services category](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - ["Funnelive service" article got 11 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Healthcare appointment scheduling remains top performer](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Link Building

  - [Outreach to website owners started](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Expecting high-quality links before June](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Aiming to reach normal goal of 20 links/month](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Keyword Rankings

  - [75+ keywords in top 10 Google results](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [101 keywords in positions 1-3 (per SEMrush)](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [532 keywords in positions 4-10](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Growth in SERP features, particularly AI views](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

### Industry Trends

  - [Google expanded AI views coverage](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Some projects seeing 10-20% click drop due to AI views](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Potential impact on impressions vs. clicks](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

  - [Bob to fix mobile responsiveness issues](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

  - [Monitor BPO and Ceylon content performance for 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Prateek to send email for SEMrush access](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Bob to address technical issues from site health report](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Async update via Slack next week due to Bob's conference](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Plan for special landing page and promotions for upcoming call center conference](https://fathom.video/share/yZ_o9sURdVLHhiNz8TkwxixYvKXyG6jp?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
